text_excerpt: Contact - Mike Reader MP Skip to content Home Find Help News About Insights Contact Home Find Help News About Insights Contact Stay updated on social media Facebook-f X-twitter Youtube Instagram Contact Scroll to find out about how I can help Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own constituents. To check if you live in my constituency, check your MP here Here’s how I can help you: As your MP I can help with a variety of issues and concerns. First steps Keeping the issue private, I can write to the relevant department, official, or Minister or make a personal appointment to discuss the issue. This can often go a long way to providing a solution to your issue. Making the issue public I can also help to make the issue public by raising it in the House of Commons, where it will be officially recorded, and could potentially come to the attention of the press and public. Outside Parliament Outside Parliament, you can request that I speak at an event concerning your issue, pledge my support to a campaign or write to the local media on your behalf. Book an appointment I hold weekly advice surgeries. They are by appointment only. To make an appointment please send an email using the contact form. Email Me mike.reader.casework@parliament.uk Book an Appointment I run weekly constituency surgeries for face-to-face support. Book a Surgery Appointment CONTACT MY OFFICE My team in Northampton South can often help without you having to attend an advice surgery. Contact my constituency office via one of the ways listed below and a member of the team will get in touch. Contact Details Email address for constituency matters and support mike.reader.casework @parliament.uk Email address for parliamentary queries mike.reader.mp @parliament.uk Address House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Leave a voicemail 01604 969523 Find Help 01604 969523 mike.reader.mp@parliament.uk Mike Reader MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Latest Latest News Videos In the media Insights All News About Biography Journey Contact Book appointment Meeting & events Social Facebook-f X-twitter Instagram Linkedin Follow me on social media Facebook-f X-twitter Instagram Linkedin Privacy Policy Cookies Policy Terms of Use Sign up to my newsletter Keep up to date with my work as your MP. Email First Name Last Name I consent to receiving updates from Mike about his work in Northamption South. I understand I can opt out at any time. See Privacy Policy for more details. Subscribe for updates Your email address is never shared with any third parties.
